Class SulfurFilter

java.lang.Object
neqsim.util.NamedBaseClass
neqsim.process.SimulationBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.ProcessEquipmentBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.TwoPortEquipment
neqsim.process.equipment.filter.Filter
neqsim.process.equipment.filter.SulfurFilter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Runnable, ProcessEquipmentInterface, TwoPortInterface, ProcessElementInterface, SimulationInterface, NamedInterface
public class SulfurFilter extends Filter
Sulfur filter for removing solid elemental sulfur (S8) from gas streams.

This equipment models a cartridge or coalescing filter designed to capture solid S8 particles that form when pipeline gas is cooled below the sulfur solubility limit (e.g., during Joule-Thomson letdown). It extends the basic Filter class with solid-phase removal tracking, filter capacity calculations, and maintenance interval estimation.

Key features:

  • Performs TP-solid flash on inlet to detect solid S8 phase
  • Removes solid S8 from the outlet stream based on removal efficiency
  • Tracks cumulative S8 mass loading (kg/hr) for filter element sizing
  • Calculates filter change interval based on element capacity
  • Integrates with SulfurFilterMechanicalDesign for vessel sizing and cost

Usage example: 


SulfurFilter filter = new SulfurFilter("S8 Filter", valveOutletStream);
filter.setRemovalEfficiency(0.99); // 99% solid removal
filter.setFilterElementCapacity(50.0); // 50 kg S8 per element set
filter.setDeltaP(0.5); // 0.5 bar clean pressure drop
filter.run();

double s8Rate = filter.getSolidSulfurRemovalRate(); // kg/hr removed
double interval = filter.getChangeIntervalHours(); // hours until change
Version:
1.0
Author:
esol
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      Serialization version UID.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • removalEfficiency

      private double removalEfficiency
      Removal efficiency for solid S8 particles (0 to 1). Default 0.99 (99%).

    • filterElementCapacity

      private double filterElementCapacity
      Filter element capacity in kg of S8 before replacement required.

    • numberOfElements

      private int numberOfElements
      Number of filter elements installed in parallel. Default 6.

    • solidSulfurRemovalRate

      private double solidSulfurRemovalRate
      Solid S8 removal rate calculated during run (kg/hr).

    • solidS8MassFractionInlet

      private double solidS8MassFractionInlet
      Total S8 mass fraction in inlet gas that is in solid phase.

    • gasFlowRate

      private double gasFlowRate
      Mass flow rate of gas through the filter (kg/hr).

    • solidS8Detected

      private boolean solidS8Detected
      Whether solid S8 was detected in the inlet stream.

    • filterType

      private String filterType
      Filter type description.

    • filtrationRating

      private double filtrationRating
      Design filtration rating in micrometres. Default 10.

    • sulfurFilterMechanicalDesign

      private SulfurFilterMechanicalDesign sulfurFilterMechanicalDesign
      Mechanical design for this filter.

    • nucleationModel

      private transient ClassicalNucleationTheory nucleationModel
      Nucleation model for particle size prediction.

    • residenceTime

      private double residenceTime
      Residence time in the supersaturated zone (seconds). Used for particle size prediction. Default 2.0 s (typical valve-to-filter transit at 5-10 m/s over 10-20 m pipe).

    • supersaturationRatio

      private double supersaturationRatio
      Supersaturation ratio of S8 at inlet conditions. Calculated from flash results or settable.

  • Constructor Details

    • SulfurFilter

      public SulfurFilter(String name, StreamInterface inStream)
      Creates a new SulfurFilter.
      Parameters:
      name - name of the sulfur filter
      inStream - inlet gas stream (may contain solid S8)

  • Method Details

    • run

      public void run(UUID id)

      In this method all thermodynamic and unit operations will be calculated in a steady state calculation.

      Specified by:
      run in interface SimulationInterface
      Overrides:
      run in class Filter
      Parameters:
      id - UUID

    • runParticleSizePrediction

      private void runParticleSizePrediction(SystemInterface system)
      Runs the Classical Nucleation Theory model to predict sulfur particle sizes.

      Uses the S8 supersaturation and process conditions to predict mean particle diameter, nucleation rate, and particle size distribution. Results are available via getNucleationModel().

      Parameters:
      system - the thermodynamic system after flash calculation

    • getSolidSulfurRemovalRate

      public double getSolidSulfurRemovalRate()
      Returns the solid S8 removal rate in kg/hr.
      Returns:
      solid sulfur removal rate in kg/hr

    • getSolidSulfurRemovalRate

      public double getSolidSulfurRemovalRate(String unit)
      Returns the solid S8 removal rate in the specified unit.
      Parameters:
      unit - the mass rate unit ("kg/hr", "kg/day", "g/hr")
      Returns:
      solid sulfur removal rate in specified unit

    • getChangeIntervalHours

      public double getChangeIntervalHours()
      Returns the estimated filter element change interval in hours.

      Calculated as: total element capacity / removal rate.

      Returns:
      change interval in hours, or Double.MAX_VALUE if no S8 removal

    • getChangeIntervalDays

      public double getChangeIntervalDays()
      Returns the estimated filter element change interval in days.
      Returns:
      change interval in days

    • isSolidS8Detected

      public boolean isSolidS8Detected()
      Returns whether solid S8 was detected in the inlet stream.
      Returns:
      true if solid S8 phase detected

    • setRemovalEfficiency

      public void setRemovalEfficiency(double efficiency)
      Sets the solid S8 removal efficiency.
      Parameters:
      efficiency - removal efficiency (0.0 to 1.0), typically 0.95 to 0.999

    • getRemovalEfficiency

      public double getRemovalEfficiency()
      Returns the solid S8 removal efficiency.
      Returns:
      removal efficiency (0 to 1)

    • setFilterElementCapacity

      public void setFilterElementCapacity(double capacityKg)
      Sets the filter element S8 holding capacity.
      Parameters:
      capacityKg - capacity in kg of solid S8 per element set

    • getFilterElementCapacity

      public double getFilterElementCapacity()
      Returns the filter element S8 holding capacity.
      Returns:
      capacity in kg per element

      Sets the number of filter elements.
      Parameters:
      count - number of filter elements

      public int getNumberOfElements()
      Returns the number of filter elements.
      Returns:
      number of elements

    • setFilterType

      public void setFilterType(String type)
      Sets the filter type.
      Parameters:
      type - filter type ("Cartridge", "Coalescing", "Mesh Pad", "Bag")

    • getFilterType

      public String getFilterType()
      Returns the filter type.
      Returns:
      filter type string

    • setFiltrationRating

      public void setFiltrationRating(double ratingMicrons)
      Sets the filtration rating.
      Parameters:
      ratingMicrons - filtration rating in micrometres (1 to 100 typical)

    • getFiltrationRating

      public double getFiltrationRating()
      Returns the filtration rating in micrometres.
      Returns:
      filtration rating

      public double getGasFlowRate()
      Returns the gas mass flow rate through the filter.
      Returns:
      mass flow rate in kg/hr

    • getSolidS8MassFractionInlet

      public double getSolidS8MassFractionInlet()
      Returns the solid S8 mass fraction detected in the inlet.
      Returns:
      mass fraction of solid S8 in inlet

    • setResidenceTime

      public void setResidenceTime(double seconds)
      Sets the residence time in the supersaturated zone used for particle size prediction.
      Parameters:
      seconds - residence time in seconds (typical 0.5-10 s)

    • getResidenceTime

      public double getResidenceTime()
      Returns the residence time used for particle size prediction.
      Returns:
      residence time in seconds

    • getNucleationModel

      public ClassicalNucleationTheory getNucleationModel()
      Returns the Classical Nucleation Theory model with particle size results. Available after run() has been called.
      Returns:
      the nucleation model, or null if not yet calculated

    • getMeanParticleDiameterMicrons

      public double getMeanParticleDiameterMicrons()
      Returns the predicted mean particle diameter in micrometres.
      Returns:
      mean particle diameter in um, or 0.0 if no solid detected

    • getParticleSizePercentilesUM

      public double[] getParticleSizePercentilesUM()
      Returns the predicted particle size percentiles (d10, d50, d90) in micrometres.
      Returns:
      array [d10, d50, d90] in um, or zeros if not calculated

    • getEstimatedCaptureEfficiency

      public double getEstimatedCaptureEfficiency()
      Returns the estimated filter capture efficiency for the predicted particle size distribution, based on the current filtration rating.
      Returns:
      capture fraction (0 to 1)

    • getSupersaturationRatio

      public double getSupersaturationRatio()
      Returns the S8 supersaturation ratio calculated from the flash.
      Returns:
      supersaturation ratio (S > 1 when supersaturated)
